category_sources: source_facts.description says it provides semantic versioning for Git projects; official docs describe generating semantic versions from Git history.
display_name_sources: source_facts.repo is GitTools/GitVersion; official docs and repository use the GitVersion name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official documentation URL; official docs page is gitversion.net/docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/GitTools/GitVersion, so repo is not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Git semantic versioning; source_facts.executables lists gitversion CLI; official docs describe Git-history-based semantic version generation.
